no-restricted-globals.name: globalThis
no-restricted-globals.message: globalThis is Chrome 71+. Old WebViews (Android 8.1 / J7 Prime) lack it — use `window` or a `typeof globalThis` guard.

no-restricted-properties.message: Object.fromEntries is Chrome 73+. Reduce into an object instead — old WebViews will throw.
Promise.allSettled is Chrome 76+. Not available on old WebViews.
Promise.any is Chrome 85+. Not available on old WebViews.
Array.prototype.flat is Chrome 69+. Use [].concat(...arr) — old WebViews will throw.
Array.prototype.flatMap is Chrome 69+. Use map(...).concat-reduce — old WebViews will throw.
String.prototype.matchAll is Chrome 73+. Use a global-regex exec loop — old WebViews will throw.
String.prototype.replaceAll is Chrome 85+. Use split(a).join(b) for plain strings — old WebViews will throw.
Array/String.prototype.at is Chrome 92+. Use arr[arr.length-1] — old WebViews will throw.
